hero.badge: The Essential Cert for the AI & Cloud Era
hero.title: AI Runs on Cloud.
hero.subtitle: ChatGPT, Netflix, every major tech product runs on cloud infrastructure. AWS, GCP and AZURE certifications are the key to the fastest-growing careers in the AI era. Practice smarter with realistic questions and in-depth explanations.

langStrip.tagline: Study cloud certifications in your native language — available in 5 languages

featuresSection.title: Why Anyone Can Pass with CloudMaster
featuresSection.subtitle: Maximum efficiency in minimum time. Detailed explanations, realistic CBT practice — everything you need to pass.

features.title: 3 Study Modes for Every Stage
features.desc: Practice Mode to build habits, Study Mode to lock in concepts with instant explanations, Exam Mode to simulate the real test. Switch modes to match your goal.

features.title: Explanations + Key Takeaways
features.desc: Every question includes a detailed explanation and a curated key-takeaway summary for last-minute review — so you understand concepts, not just answers.

features.title: Target Your Weak Spots
features.desc: Topic-by-topic score analysis pinpoints exactly where you're weak, so you can drill only what matters.

features.title: 30-Minute Session Design
features.desc: 30 minutes a day or an hour on weekends — short, consistent sessions that stack into real exam-ready skills.

features.title: Certification Roadmap & Domains
features.desc: Browse the AWS, GCP and AZURE certification roadmap to set your target. See domain weights and topic breakdowns before you even start studying.

features.title: Study Anywhere, Anytime
features.desc: Phone, tablet, or PC — pick up right where you left off. Install as a PWA for app-like speed anywhere.

steps.title: Choose Your Target Certification
steps.desc: Explore the AWS, GCP and AZURE certification roadmap to pick your goal. Review domain breakdowns and difficulty levels before you begin.

steps.title: Study Across 3 Modes
steps.desc: Use Practice Mode to build fluency, Study Mode to master concepts, and Exam Mode to sharpen your test-day instincts. Cycle through all three to accelerate your progress.

steps.title: Target Weak Spots with Analytics
steps.desc: Your analytics report shows exactly where you're weak by domain. Drill wrong answers until weak spots become strengths — then go take the exam.

routine.title: The 30-Min Exam Pass Routine
routine.subtitle: Follow this routine daily and you'll be ready to pass in 2–3 months.

steps.title: Practice Mode: Solve CBT Questions
steps.desc: Open Practice Mode and work through 10–20 questions with the timer on. Realistic pressure keeps your exam instincts sharp.

steps.title: Study Mode: Master Wrong Answers
steps.desc: Switch to Study Mode to read detailed explanations and key takeaways for every mistake. Understanding the "why" stops you from repeating it.

steps.title: Analytics: Lock In Tomorrow's Focus
steps.desc: Check your domain analytics report to see today's weak spots. As data accumulates, your study plan gets smarter and your gaps close faster.

testimonials.title: Pass Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from working professionals who made the time.

items.name: Kim Minjun
items.quote: Passed in two and a half months studying 30 minutes after work. The detailed explanations made every wrong answer a learning opportunity, and mobile study during my commute made it sustainable.

items.name: Lee Seoyeon
items.quote: AI certification felt daunting, but locking in the concepts with in-depth explanations first, then drilling CBT questions, made it click. Passed on the first try.

items.name: Park Dohyun
items.quote: Meetings, overtime — the works. But the short session format meant I could always squeeze in study time. The weak-spot drills right before the exam pushed me over the line.

questions.q: What are AWS, GCP and AZURE — and why do I need them?
questions.a: AWS (Amazon), GCP (Google), and AZURE (Microsoft) are the three cloud platforms that power over 70% of the world's digital infrastructure. ChatGPT, Netflix, and countless everyday services run on them. Since 90%+ of AI and big data work is cloud-based, these certifications are essential for anyone in or entering the tech industry.

questions.q: Can non-IT backgrounds take these exams?
questions.a: Absolutely. Entry-level cloud certifications like AWS CLF-C02 require no coding experience. CloudMaster breaks down every concept with clear, detailed explanations, so anyone can study systematically and pass.
We currently offer AIF-C01 (AI Practitioner), SAA-C03 (Solutions Architect Associate), and DEA-C01 (Data Engineer Associate). More certifications are being added.

questions.q: Can I study on mobile during my commute?
questions.a: Absolutely. CloudMaster is a PWA and can be installed like an app on your phone. Study on the subway, bus, or during your lunch break.

questions.q: What if I close the app mid-exam?
questions.a: No worries. Progress is auto-saved after every answer. You can resume exactly where you left off, even after losing connection.

cta.title: Start Learning Today
cta.subtitle: Thousands of learners have earned cloud certifications with CloudMaster. You're next.
